title: Gongronema taylorii
taxonomy: Gongronema taylorii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to West Africa. Gongronema taylorii is a perennial climber with ovate or lanceolate leaves that are dark green in color. It produces white or pale yellow flowers that are clustered together and have a funnel-shaped corolla. Gongronema taylorii is classified within the genus Gongronema, which is a group of plants that are commonly found in tropical regions.

The plant is also said to be used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties.
